GIL PURCELL, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF ALL PLAINTIFFS. (JUDGE TANG ON TEMPORARY ASSIGNMENT TO THE HALL OF JUSTICE). DEPT. 303 IS ADVISED THAT ALL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS HAVE BEEN EXHAUSTED.
